# T-OS-451: pretool deny direct edit of generated files
> bash scripts/codex/run-in-worktree.sh T-OS-451 --keep-worktree
> Iron Law: git add/commit/push 禁止

## Required
- .claude/hooks/policy_core.py: GENERATED_FILE_PATTERNS list 追加
  - .*\.generated\.(md|yaml|json)$
  - .ai/DASHBOARD\.generated\.md$ etc
- is_generated_file(path) check
- write/edit to generated file → ("StateMutationViaOrgTool", "direct edit of generated file blocked")
- tests/kernel/test-generated-edit-deny.sh (2+ tests)
- 既存 95+ tests pass 維持

## Allowed: .claude/hooks/policy_core.py, tests/kernel/
